arts.sum: Mathys Tel ended up joining Tottenham despite rejecting Ange Postecoglou's side initially, before having a change of heart following a phone call with the Australian coach

arts.ttl: What Tottenham January business means for Cardoso, Guehi, Tel and the summer transfer plans
arts.sum: Such a big month for the football club after a host of injuries in Ange Postecoglou's squad, Spurs finished the winter market with three new additions. Again, if Spurs do indeed want to lure the United States international to N17, it is something they should do early so that Postecoglou has sufficient time with his new signings in pre-season.

arts.ttl: Spurs team Postecoglou to pick vs Liverpool with Van de Ven call and Tel debut
arts.sum: All eyes will be on Ange Postecoglou's Tottenham team to take on Liverpool as the head coach has some huge calls to make over Micky van de Ven, Kevin Danso and Mathys Tel. The hope will be that Van de Ven is able to take his place in the starting XI at Anfield after missing out on the matchday squad at Brentford last Sunday. Postecoglou finally has some selection decisions to make with the new arrivals Kevin Danso and Mathys Tel, if both have their work permits in time to play in the match.

arts.ttl: Harry Kane breaks silence on Mathys Tel Tottenham transfer and delivers verdict fans will love
arts.sum: Harry Kane believes Mathys Tel can "fulfil all the potential he has" following his deadline day move to Tottenham. Kane knows all about the 19-year-old following their time playing alongside each other at Bayern.

arts.ttl: Why Axel Disasi can't play for Aston Villa vs Tottenham as FA Cup rules explained
arts.sum: Axel Disasi will be unable to feature in Aston Villa's FA Cup fourth-round tie against Tottenham Hotspur on Saturday night due to playing in the competition already this season for Chelsea. FA Cup rules state that players cannot play for two different teams in the competition during the same season, with Disasi featuring for his parent club, Chelsea, in their 5-0 win over League Two outfit Morecambe.

arts.ttl: Every word Johan Lange said on Tottenham January transfers, late deals, Tel X-factor and loans
arts.sum: A key month for the football club, Spurs managed to add three new players to Ange Postecoglou's squad after completing deals for Antonin Kinsky, Kevin Danso and Mathys Tel . "We're not the only team who has injuries and also the dynamic of the new European format, both meaning that all the clubs competing in the European competitions this season here have had to play group matches in January, which is never the case.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou issues Micky van de Ven Tottenham injury update for Liverpool Carabao Cup clash
arts.sum: Amid plenty of question marks over Van de Ven's injury status going into such an important cup fixture against Liverpool with a place in the Carabao Cup final up for grabs, Postecoglou has provided the latest on the 23-year-old as well as new additions Kevin Danso and Mathys Tel. Ange Postecoglou has confirmed that Micky van de Ven will not feature for Tottenham in Thursday's Carabao Cup semi-final second leg tie against Liverpool.

arts.ttl: Every word Ange Postecoglou said on Micky van de Ven, Mathys Tel chat and Tottenham's transfers
arts.sum: Postecoglou spoke about both players' chances of playing in the game and discussed how the Tel move happened with his key part in convincing the 19-year-old Frenchman to come from Bayern Munich, with the option this summer to make the switch a more permanent one. I think maybe a couple of clubs may feel, we got what we want done, but it was tricky.
